# Samuel y Audrey Bilingual YouTube Transcript Corpus ES/EN

This dataset contains 643 Spanish-English bilingual YouTube transcript records from the Samuel y Audrey channel.

Canonical dataset:
https://huggingface.co/datasets/samuelandaudreymedianetwork/samuel-y-audrey-youtube-transcripts-es-en

Zenodo DOI:
https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18665315

YouTube channel:
https://youtube.com/@samuelyaudrey

Recommended files:
- samuel-y-audrey-youtube-transcripts-es-en.jsonl
- samuel-y-audrey-youtube-transcripts-es-en.csv
- DATA_DICTIONARY.md
- SCHEMA.json
- CITATION.cff

Records:
- 643 bilingual_youtube_transcript records

Language order:
Spanish first, English second.

License:
CC BY-NC 4.0

Contact:
nomadicsamuel@gmail.com
